tasks.subject: Task 0: Setup — TypeScript deps, config, delete old files
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Install @types/node, replace playwright.config.js with dual-server TypeScript config, delete app.spec.js, create tests/tsconfig.json.

**Files:**
- Modify: `frontend/package.json`
- Create: `frontend/playwright.config.ts`
- Delete: `frontend/playwright.config.js`
- Delete: `frontend/tests/e2e/app.spec.js`
- Create: `frontend/tests/tsconfig.json`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `npm run test:e2e -- --list` exits 0 with 0 tests
- [ ] playwright.config.ts exists; playwright.config.js does not
- [ ] app.spec.js does not exist

**Verify:** `cd frontend && npm run test:e2e -- --list` → `0 tests`

```json:metadata
{"files":["frontend/playwright.config.ts","frontend/tests/tsconfig.json","frontend/package.json"],"verifyCommand":"cd frontend && npm run test:e2e -- --list","acceptanceCriteria":["playwright.config.ts exists","playwright.config.js deleted","app.spec.js deleted","test:e2e --list exits 0"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: Add data-testid attributes to MapView and QuizPage
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add data-testid attributes to stats, status badge, pause button, and quiz elements.

**Files:**
- Modify: `frontend/src/MapView.jsx`
- Modify: `frontend/src/components/QuizPage.jsx`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] 10 data-testid attributes added across both files
- [ ] Build passes without errors

**Verify:** `cd frontend && npm run build 2>&1 | tail -5`

```json:metadata
{"files":["frontend/src/MapView.jsx","frontend/src/components/QuizPage.jsx"],"verifyCommand":"cd frontend && npm run build 2>&1 | tail -5","acceptanceCriteria":["10 data-testid attributes added","build passes without errors"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Create Page Objects (LandingPage, SimulationPage, QuizPage)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create three TypeScript POM classes.

**Files:**
- Create: `frontend/tests/e2e/pages/LandingPage.ts`
- Create: `frontend/tests/e2e/pages/SimulationPage.ts`
- Create: `frontend/tests/e2e/pages/QuizPage.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] tsc --noEmit exits 0
- [ ] All three classes exported

**Verify:** `cd frontend && npx tsc --project tests/tsconfig.json --noEmit`

```json:metadata
{"files":["frontend/tests/e2e/pages/LandingPage.ts","frontend/tests/e2e/pages/SimulationPage.ts","frontend/tests/e2e/pages/QuizPage.ts"],"verifyCommand":"cd frontend && npx tsc --project tests/tsconfig.json --noEmit","acceptanceCriteria":["tsc exits 0","LandingPage exported","SimulationPage exported","QuizPage exported"]}
```
